mnemonics: S.P.A.R.K. your text: Scan, Process, Analyze, Rank, Knowledge
keyPoints: Spark provides high-level APIs for distributed processing of large text datasets.
It uses Resilient Distributed Datasets (RDDs) and DataFrames for efficient in-memory computations on text.
Spark MLlib offers built-in tools for text-specific tasks like tokenization, TF-IDF, and topic modeling.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to configure Spark for the specific memory requirements of text processing jobs.
Confusing the lazy evaluation of transformations with the eager execution of actions, leading to performance issues.
Improperly handling the partitioning of large text files, which can cause data skew and slow performance.
